## Title: Fix use-after-free vulnerability in AT+COPS test command parser

### Summary
The `parse_cops_test` function in the NAS UE AT command parser did not initialize the `mask` field when handling the AT+COPS=? test command. This omission created a use-after-free vulnerability, as downstream command processing logic relies on the mask to determine whether parameter fields contain valid allocated memory that requires cleanup.
